Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}When you meet certain people in school or in the city, you may develop a Social Link with them. When fusing Personas, these Social Links will affect the results of the fusion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}When you fuse a Persona that has the same Arcana as one of your Social Links, {f 0 1 2}the resulting Persona will gain bonus experience{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Try to establish relationships with many people to enhance your Personas' capabilities.[n]{f 1 1}
